intro.zh: 正在寻找线控底盘 / 电机控制算法 / 车载电动执行器控制方向的工作机会，欢迎联系交流。
intro.en: Open to roles in chassis-by-wire, motor-control algorithms, and automotive electric-actuator control — feel free to reach out.

description.zh: 寻求线控底盘、电机控制算法、车载电动执行器控制与车规控制器开发方向的岗位。
description.en: Looking for positions in chassis-by-wire, motor-control algorithms, electric-actuator control, and automotive controller development.
